pattern: A running total only needs the previous total plus the current element, so one left-to-right pass builds the whole answer.
hints: The value at each position is the sum of everything up to and including it - you don't need to re-add the whole prefix every time.
Keep a single running accumulator: add the current element to it and that is the next output value.
Walk the array once, appending the updated accumulator to the result after each addition.

edge_inputs.description: single element, running sum is just that element
extreme positive and negative values back to back
running total dips negative in the middle before recovering

stress.description: near-max length with values spanning the full range
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    nums = [rng.randint(-1000000, 1000000) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
